# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

FROM alpine:3.19

# Install Docker CLI and security tools
RUN apk add --no-cache \
    docker-cli \
    ca-certificates \
    su-exec \
    tini

# Create non-root user for running the application
RUN addgroup -g 1000 orchestrator && \
    adduser -D -u 1000 -G orchestrator orchestrator

# Create directory for application with proper permissions
RUN mkdir -p /app /app/logs /app/config && \
    chown -R orchestrator:orchestrator /app

WORKDIR /app

# Copy application files (assuming you have these)
COPY --chown=orchestrator:orchestrator entrypoint.sh /app/
COPY --chown=orchestrator:orchestrator validate-input.sh /app/
COPY --chown=orchestrator:orchestrator orchestrator.sh /app/

# Make scripts executable
RUN chmod 500 /app/entrypoint.sh /app/validate-input.sh /app/orchestrator.sh

# Security hardening
RUN rm -rf /tmp/* /var/cache/apk/* && \
    chmod 1777 /tmp

# Set secure environment variables
ENV DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock \
    DOCKER_API_VERSION=1.43 \
    DOCKER_CERT_PATH=/app/certs \
    DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY=1 \
    LOG_LEVEL=info \
    ALLOWED_IMAGES_FILE=/app/config/allowed-images.txt \
    ALLOWED_OPERATIONS_FILE=/app/config/allowed-operations.txt

# Create allowlist configuration files
RUN echo "# Allowed Docker images (one per line)" > /app/config/allowed-images.txt && \
    echo "# Allowed operations: create,start,stop,remove,inspect" > /app/config/allowed-operations.txt && \
    chown orchestrator:orchestrator /app/config/*.txt && \
    chmod 400 /app/config/*.txt

# Health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD docker version >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1

# Use tini as init system to handle signals properly
ENTRYPOINT ["/sbin/tini", "--"]

# Run as non-root user (will need docker group membership via supplementary GID)
USER orchestrator

# Default command runs the entrypoint script
CMD ["/app/entrypoint.sh"]

# Labels for security and compliance
LABEL maintainer="security@example.com" \
      security.scan="required" \
      security.privileged="docker-socket-access" \
      description="Container orchestration service with least-privilege Docker access"
